codeReview.summary: Reviewed the prior failed fix (`fix-tui-footer-and-passive-polling`) alongside the rerun fix commit `159a3b21`, the worker handoff, and the transcript skeleton. This rerun fully addresses the remaining footer-wrap blocker: the TUI now sizes the footer from its wrapped content instead of a fixed six-row region, and the regression test was updated to use the same long runtime-active-account failure wording that previously exposed clipping.

summary: Pass. The rerun replaces the fixed-height footer with content-based sizing and adds realistic long-message regression coverage, so the prior footer-wrap visibility failure is adequately resolved.
